commands: node $SNAP_CASES_DIR/../snap-tests/.shared/mock-npm-registry.mjs -- vp install -g first-alias@npm:npm-alias-string-bin-real # Install alias whose real package has a string bin
cat $VP_HOME/bins/npm-alias-string-bin-real.json # BinConfig should use the real string-bin name
node $SNAP_CASES_DIR/../snap-tests/.shared/mock-npm-registry.mjs -- vp install -g second-alias@npm:npm-alias-string-bin-real # A second alias should conflict on the real bin before install
test ! -d $VP_HOME/packages/second-alias && echo 'second alias was not installed'
cat $VP_HOME/bins/npm-alias-string-bin-real.json # BinConfig should still point to the first alias
